data.body: Ensure Knots exposes enough workflow/profile metadata for downstream applications to make routing and escalation decisions. A consumer looking at a knot should be able to determine who owns the current or next action, what artifact/output is expected for that step, and what the reviewer is supposed to inspect. Knots does not need to implement downstream escalation, but it must provide stable data in its workflow/profile and knot views.
data.title: Expose owner and artifact metadata for downstream apps
